text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Parenting & Childcare > Case/Care Management * Teen Pregnancy Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF INSIGHTS YOUNG PARENT SERVICES HOMESAFE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Intensive case management. Case managers assist in obtaining services such as parenting classes, housing assistance, life skills training, health care, childcare, employment, or staying in school. 4900 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Houseless, single, pregnant or parenting birthing parent age 19 and younger Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm (503) 239-6996 Get Directions Visit Website More Details INSIGHTS YOUNG PARENT SERVICES HOMESAFE PROGRAM
